comments.text: This video is RIDICULOUS!  Norway, as a country, is far from "the world's most beautiful country!  When you think about the country with the most incredible national parks, the most preserved wildlife and the most protected great parts of the entire country America, meaning the USA, would probably be ranked in a world poll as #1.  Why?  Well let's start adding incredible things about the USA that makes our country truly wonderful.  Yellowstone, the Rockies, the Mississippi, Florida including the Keys and the Everglades, California (all of it); Minnesota, Land of 10,000 Lakes, Hawaii, the most tropical place in the world with active volcanoes and ancient jungles and snow capped huge mountains on the Big Island of Hawaii, not to mention the most fantastic beaches and warm ocean in the entire world, and on and on and on...  StocktonRob

comments.author: @DerrickRossDrRoss-y2b
comments.text: It’s funny I always hear about the low crime the free healthcare of every Scandinavian country and when I was doing my doctoral degree over in England and live in in Scandinavia, no one talks about the elephant in the room. Yes Norway is nice if you’re white, like most Scandinavian countries. However, if you don’t speak the language, or you are a minority, these are some of the most awful places to live. Also, no one talks about the high suicide rate because of the darkness during the winter time, how summer is barely existed. How the school system is inadequate, compared to the rest of modern civilization. So when I see videos like this, they are generally disingenuous. My wife is from Denmark. My kids were born in Denmark, we have no desire whatsoever to move back to a Scandinavian country.

comments.text: One of my go-to places from 2019 on.  Covid killed it.  Now I learn that most residents can't make it financially.  Income taxes upward to 50%, then VAT of 25%.  There is hardly anything left for transportation or retirement.  I understand that there is an exit tax if you want to leave the Country.  No thanks.

comments.author: @sadgamaya-sunnyvaderi
comments.text:
Brother,
I paused the video midway to write this comment, for I simply could not continue watching without first expressing a few words of gratitude to you. In truth, not only could I not continue watching, I found myself unable to do anything else.

You have held me spellbound by the enchanting beauty of Norway. The background score, the deeply evocative narration that stirs the soul, and every other element of this presentation are nothing short of magnificent. Everything about it is exquisitely crafted.

My heartfelt thanks to you for revealing, through the eye of your camera, such breathtaking wonders that time and the world often keep hidden from us.

With warm regards and sincere appreciation,

Sunny Vaderi
From India, a land that itself conceals countless magical spectacles of nature.🥰💚🤍❤
